---
title: "Research Assistant"
description: |
  This page lists all workshops, talks, and sessions with details and thumbnails.
listing:
  - id: TM1
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm1   
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: TM2
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 250px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm2
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: TM3
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm3
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: TM4
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm4
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: TM5
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm5
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: TM6
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm6
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: TM7
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm7
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: TM8
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm8
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: TM9
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm9
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: TM10
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, date]
    contents: 
      - tm10
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

## Nilanjona Halder

::: {#TM1}
:::

## Asadullah Wakif

::: {#TM2}
:::

## Shaila Parvin Moreom

::: {#TM3}
:::

## Nure Hasana

::: {#TM4}
:::

## Sharmin Akter

::: {#TM5}
:::

## Aniruddha Sarker Amlan

::: {#TM6}
:::

## Anupama Sharma 

::: {#TM7}
:::

## Aniruddha Sarker Amlan

::: {#TM8}
:::

## Tasmia Akter Sakira 

::: {#TM9}
:::

## Rubuya Amin Tasnim 

::: {#TM10}
:::
